blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,944 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 31".
